privileged_info_summary: The task retrieves real chemical safety data from PubChem, an authoritative public database maintained by the National Center for Biotechnology Information (NCBI). Three industrial chemicals are researched: Acetone (CAS 67-64-1), Sodium Hydroxide (CAS 1310-73-2), and Toluene (CAS 108-88-3). All GHS classifications and NFPA hazard ratings claimed in the task metadata are verified accurate. Acetone has GHS signal word 'Danger' with H225 hazard statement and NFPA ratings (health: 1, fire: 3). Sodium Hydroxide has GHS signal word 'Danger' with H314 hazard statement and NFPA rating (health: 3). Toluene has GHS signal word 'Danger' with H225, H304, H361 hazard statements and NFPA ratings (health: 2, fire: 3). The data sources are the official PubChem compound pages accessed via the PubChem REST API.
